# integrations.sh

> integrations.sh is an open source registry of integration surfaces: APIs, MCP servers, GraphQL endpoints, and CLIs for thousands of services, each mapped to the credentials it needs and how to acquire them.

## Data

- [Catalog API](https://integrations.sh/api.json): the full index as JSON
- [Domains](https://integrations.sh/api/domains.json): all domains with format counts
- [OpenAPI spec](https://integrations.sh/openapi.json): the REST API (detect + discover)
- [Owner declaration](https://integrations.sh/.well-known/integrations.json): our own integration surface

## Endpoints

- MCP server: https://integrations.sh/mcp (streamable-http, public)
- Detect: https://integrations.sh/api/{domain}/detect
- Discover: https://integrations.sh/api/{domain}/discover
- Per-domain data: https://integrations.sh/api/{domain}/discovery

## Publishing

- [Publishing your integration surface](https://integrations.sh/publishing/): the formats we read
